sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh hong ngakna mun huan sung khat om,
Tua in a lamdang mun hoih khat hi;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Aw, a hoih huan sung thungetna hi;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Vangik pua kawmin Amah ka zuan;
A kam sung pan hehnepna aw ka

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Jesuh hong ngakna mun huan sung khat
Amah tawh kimu dingin hong sam;
Topa tawh kimu, kiho khawm dingin,
